name: @mjweavermount/rta
description: RTA app-authoring platform for governed, observable, reviewable applications from domain vocabulary.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @rta/vocab build && pnpm --filter @rta/core build && pnpm --filter @rta/strict build && pnpm --filter @rta/runtime build && pnpm --filter @rta/cli build && pnpm --filter @rta/scenario build && pnpm --filter @rta/example-meeting-digest build
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm check:golden-fixture && pnpm check:sample-app-loop
scripts.check:golden-fixture: pnpm --filter @rta/vocab build && pnpm --filter @rta/core build && pnpm --filter @rta/strict build && pnpm --filter @rta/runtime build && pnpm --filter @rta/cli build && node scripts/check-golden-fixture.mjs
scripts.check:sample-app-loop: pnpm --filter @rta/vocab build && pnpm --filter @rta/core build && pnpm --filter @rta/strict build && pnpm --filter @rta/runtime build && pnpm --filter @rta/cli build && node scripts/check-sample-app-loop.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @rta/vocab test && pnpm --filter @rta/core test && pnpm --filter @rta/strict test && pnpm --filter @rta/runtime test && pnpm --filter @rta/cli test && pnpm --filter @rta/scenario test && pnpm --filter @rta/example-meeting-digest test
